title: The Freestyle Sp Lsp3Blaxzn
features: Unexpected joy everywhere
Portable, powerful and surprisingly simple
Free to move
Put your screen wherever you want
Find the perfect viewing angle. Shift your screen from the wall to the ceiling with a few easy clicks. Just tilt and go.
Fits in one hand
Meet The Freestyle. It’s everything you want in a smart projector in one compact form.
The Freestyle makes setup easy
Straightens itself like magic
The Freestyle automatically corrects skewed images for a straight, rectangular screen every time. All you have to do is turn it on.
Powerful projector performance
Big screen magic, up to 100"
The Freestyle can project screens from 30 inches up to an incredible 100 inches. Make your own home theatre with screens as big as 100 inches.
Find the sweet spot for your screen
Adjust your screen without moving the projector. Scale down by up to 50% and move in all four directions until you find that perfect position.
See the true color
No white wall? The Freestyle optimizes projection based on wall color and enhances your watching experience.
Experience each moment in brilliant picture quality
Immerse yourself in full HD resolution and vivid color that feels like you're right there in the scene.
Samsung Smart TV experience
The smart way to access your favorite content
Smart TV brings you a world of content with certified OTT apps as well as Samsung's own services.
Just say what you want
With built-in Samsung Bixby and Amazon Alexa, you can control The Freestyle with just your voice.
Mirror your mobile to the big screen
Stream content straight from your phone, with SmartThings app for Android and iOS, or AirPlay 2 for Apple devices.
Connect and watch your TV from any room
Mirror, control and watch your TV via The Freestyle.
Diverse embedded content to create the perfect ambiance.
Transform your space into whatever your want it to be. Choose from lighting, prism, and scene or one of your own photos—the possibilities are endless.
Accessories compatible with The Freestyle
Discover new ways to enjoy The Freestyle with exclusive accessories.
